'''makufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:laari|laari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laari|laari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| makufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækifith|mækifith]] || [[word:mækifij|mækifij]] || [[word:mækifish|mækifish]] || [[word:mækifi|mækifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:makukufuth|makukufuth]] || [[word:makukufuj|makukufuj]] || [[word:makukufush|makukufush]] || [[word:makukufu|makukufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:makufuth|makufuth]] || [[word:makufuj|makufuj]] || [[word:makufush|makufush]] || [[word:makufu|makufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:makuffuth|makuffuth]] || [[word:makuffuj|makuffuj]] || [[word:makuffush|makuffush]] || [[word:makuffuf|makuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makufuthu|makufuthu]] || [[word:makufuju|makufuju]] || [[word:makufushu|makufushu]] || [[word:makufuku|makufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makufuth|makufuth]] || [[word:makufuj|makufuj]] || [[word:makufush|makufush]] || [[word:makufu|makufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makufuthul|makufuthul]] || [[word:makufujul|makufujul]] || [[word:makufushul|makufushul]] || [[word:makufukul|makufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makufuthuthu|makufuthuthu]] || [[word:makufujuju|makufujuju]] || [[word:makufushushu|makufushushu]] || [[word:makufuku|makufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makufuthun|makufuthun]] || [[word:makufujun|makufujun]] || [[word:makufushun|makufushun]] || [[word:makufukun|makufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makufuthuoro|makufuthuoro]] || [[word:makufujuoro|makufujuoro]] || [[word:makufushuoro|makufushuoro]] || [[word:makufukuoro|makufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
